overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a cozy medieval common room with an ornate stone fireplace. A translucent ghostly figure moves around the left side of the room while the camera pans subtly, capturing the warm firelight and Gothic stone architecture.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a warm, firelit medieval common room with an ornate stone fireplace as the centerpiece. A translucent ghostly figure stands to the left, partially obscured by the edge of the frame. The camera pans subtly, revealing wooden pillars and stone architecture while the ghost paces near the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval common room with central fireplace

ghostly figure re-enters frame from the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right, observing the room without the ghost temporarily

notable_agents.action: ghost moving in and out of view, phasing through the left wall area

segments.scene_description: The camera continues to pan across the common room, briefly losing sight of the ghostly figure as it moves behind the wooden pillar or fades from view. The fireplace remains the central focus with its warm glow illuminating the stone walls. The ghost reappears after a few seconds, continuing its slow pacing near the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval common room with central fireplace

events.description: ghostly figure returns to full visibility in left portion of frame

agents.ego_description: panning back left to center, focusing on the fireplace and ghost

notable_agents.action: ghost standing still or moving slowly near the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera pans back toward the center, returning to the original view of the fireplace. The ghostly figure is once again visible on the left, maintaining its ethereal presence in the warm firelight. The scene remains static with the fire burning steadily and the Gothic architecture providing a cozy, medieval atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a subtle camera pan across a cozy medieval common room, shifting focus between a central ornate fireplace and a lingering ghostly presence. It begins with a view of the firelit stone architecture and a translucent figure pacing near the left wall. As the camera continues its sweep, the ghost briefly vanishes behind a wooden pillar, leaving the warm glow of the fireplace to illuminate the surrounding Gothic stone walls. The scene then shifts back toward the center, bringing the ethereal figure back into view as it maintains its slow movement. Finally, the camera settles on the original composition, capturing the steady burn of the fire and the quiet, haunting atmosphere of the room.
